bg.$description: No unified background — multiple color zones coexist:  zone beside #0000FF zone beside #FFFFFF zone; the viewport has no singular ground

primary.$description: — the loudest possible CTA; red as internet-detritus alert, not brand primary

accent.$description: No single accent — , #FF00FF, and #FFFF00 all function as accent simultaneously in different zones

spring.$description: Motion v12 two-parameter spring (bounce/visualDuration) or v11 legacy (stiffness/damping/mass).

base.$description: Base grid unit (all spacing is a multiple of this).
